zh.lifeSummary: Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill是Sir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-Giffard和Aveline的兒子，於1010年6月27日出生在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯隆維爾。他於1033年7月3日與Ermengarde Flaitel在法國諾門迪曼其隆維爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1084年7月15日在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利隆維爾-素-希享年74歲，埋葬在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯隆維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill是Sir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-Giffard和Aveline的儿子，于1010年6月27日出生在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯隆維爾。他于1033年7月3日与Ermengarde Flaitel在法国諾門迪曼其隆維爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1084年7月15日在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利隆維爾-素-希享年74岁，埋葬在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯隆維爾。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

nameMeanings.name: Gautier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill was born on 27 June 1010, in Longueville, Calvados, Normandy, France as the son of Sir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-Giffard and Aveline. He married Ermengarde Flaitel on 3 July 1033, in Longueville, Manche, Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 15 July 1084, in Longueville-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, at the age of 74, and was buried in Longueville, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill est né le 27 juin 1010, à Longueville, Calvados, Normandie, France, fils de Sir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-Giffard et Aveline. Il a épousé Ermengarde Flaitel le 3 juillet 1033, à Longueville, Manche, Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 15 juillet 1084, à Longueville-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Longueville, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill wurde am 27. Juni 1010 in Longueville, Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich, als Sohn von Sir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-Giffard und Aveline geboren. Er hat am 3. Juli 1033 in Longueville, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich Ermengarde Flaitel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Juli 1084 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Longueville-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Longueville, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill è nato il il 27 giugno 1010 nel Longueville, Calvados, Normandie, Francia come figlio di Sir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-Giffard e Aveline. Lui sposato Ermengarde Flaitel il 3 luglio 1033, nel Longueville, Manche, Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 15 luglio 1084, nel Longueville-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Longueville, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevillは1010年6月27日にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスロングエヴィルでSir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-GiffardとAvelineの息子として生まれた。1033年7月3日にフランスノーマンディマンチェロングエヴィルでErmengarde Flaitelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1084年7月15日にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメロングエヴィレ-スル-スシで74歳で死去し，フランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスロングエヴィルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill(은)는 1010년 6월 27일 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 론구에빌에서 Sir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-Giffard(와)과 Aveline의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1033년 7월 3일 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 론구에빌에서 Ermengarde Flaitel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1084년 7월 15일 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 론구에비레-수-스시에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 론구에빌에 묻혔다.

mn.27 June 1010–15 July 1084: 1010 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 27–1084 оны Долоодугаар сарын 15

pt.27 June 1010–15 July 1084: 27 de junho de 1010–15 de julho de 1084
pt.lifeSummary: Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill nasceu em 27 de junho de 1010, em Longueville, Calvados, Normandie, França filho de Sir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-Giffard e Aveline. Ele casou-se com Ermengarde Flaitel em 3 de julho de 1033, em Longueville, Manche, Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de julho de 1084, em Longueville-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Longueville, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill родился 27 июня 1010 г. в местности лонгуевилл, калвадос, норманди, Франция. Его родителей звали Sir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-Giffard и Aveline. Он женился на женщине по имени Ermengarde Flaitel 3 июля 1033 г. в местности лонгуевилл, манч, норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 15 июля 1084 г. в местности лонгуевилле-сур-сси, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности лонгуевилл, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция.

es.27 June 1010–15 July 1084: 27 de junio de 1010–15 de julio de 1084
es.lifeSummary: Walter Gautier De Boldebec 1st Earl Of Longuevill nació el 27 de junio de 1010, en Longueville, Calvados, Normandie, Francia como hijo de Sir Osbert De Boldebec Lord of Longueville-le-Giffard y Aveline. Se casó con Ermengarde Flaitel el 3 de julio de 1033, en Longueville, Manche, Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 15 de julio de 1084, en Longueville-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Longueville, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia.
